description:

events.title: East Bengal FC vs. Bengaluru FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Indian Super League game, scheduled for Thursday, April 16, 2026 between East Bengal FC and Bengaluru FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on the East Bengal FC vs. Bengaluru FC clash reflects razor-thin margins at 50.5% across all outcomes, capturing the ISL intensity between two playoff-hungry mid-table sides with identical recent form—each securing one win and one draw in their last two outings. East Bengal's home edge at Salt Lake Stadium pairs with attacking threats like Cleiton Silva, fresh off a goal contribution, while Bengaluru FC counters with a robust away defense (conceding just 1.2 goals per game) and Sunil Chhetri's enduring influence despite no major injuries per official reports. Head-to-head history tilts slightly Bengaluru's way (4-3 in last 10), but mutual inconsistencies and tactical caution often yield stalemates, keeping probabilities bunched.

question: Will the US confirm that aliens exist by March 31?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the President of the United States, any member of the Cabinet of the United States, any member of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, or any US federal agency definitively states that extraterrestrial life or technology exists by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the government of the United States, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Will the US confirm that aliens exist by...?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the President of the United States, any member of the Cabinet of the United States, any member of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, or any US federal agency definitively states that extraterrestrial life or technology exists by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the government of the United States, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus overwhelmingly dismisses the likelihood of a US government confirmation of alien existence by year-end, with yes-side implied probabilities languishing below 10%, driven by the Pentagon's March 2024 All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office report explicitly finding no evidence of extraterrestrial technology or beings despite reviewing decades of UAP cases. Recent congressional hearings, including whistleblower David Grusch's unproven claims of non-human biologics, have fueled pop culture buzz via podcasts and documentaries but yielded zero verifiable disclosures, echoing historical patterns of classified secrecy. Public fascination persists amid election-year speculation—Trump has teased declassifying UFO files—but upcoming lame-duck sessions offer slim odds of breakthrough absent leaked hard evidence, underscoring entertainment's role in amplifying unconfirmed hype over policy shifts.

question: Trump declassifies new UFO files by April 30?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Trump administration declassifies any files pertaining to extraterrestrial life and/or unexplained aerial phenomena which were not previously publicly available by April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For purposes of this market, the “Trump administration” includes the Executive Office of the President and all executive branch departments, agencies, and subordinate offices under presidential authority during the Trump presidency, including the Department of Defense and its components.

Announcements of declassifications that are not implemented within this market's timeframe will not count.

The primary resolution source for declassification will be official information from the government of the United States; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Trump declassifies new UFO files by...?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Trump administration declassifies any files pertaining to extraterrestrial life and/or unexplained aerial phenomena which were not previously publicly available by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trump's campaign pledges to declassify UFO and UAP files, reiterated in recent interviews, form the core driver of trader optimism on this market, with odds implying moderate confidence in action post-inauguration on January 20, 2025. His selection of Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence—who has advocated for UAP transparency—bolsters sentiment, alongside incoming administration signals from allies like Robert F. Kennedy Jr. expressing disclosure interest. Historical precedent includes partial 2020 releases under Trump amid congressional pressure via the UAP Disclosure Act. Uncertainty persists over "new" files definition, national security redactions, and prioritization amid early-term priorities; watch for executive orders or ODNI announcements in Q1 2025.

question: Will the Reserve Bank of Australia decrease the target for the cash rate after the June Meeting?
description:
This market will resolve according to the change in the target for the cash rate resulting from the Reserve Bank of Australia Monetary Policy Board’s June meeting, relative to the level it was prior to this meeting.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Reserve Bank of Australia after its June 16, 2026 meeting, as listed on the official Reserve Bank of Australia calendar: https://www.rba.gov.au/schedules-events/board-meeting-schedules.html

This market may resolve as soon as the Reserve Bank of Australia's media release for their June 16, 2026 meeting with relevant data is issued. If no decision on the target for the cash rate is issued by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No Change" bracket.

events.title: Reserve Bank of Australia Decision in June?
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the change in the target for the cash rate resulting from the Reserve Bank of Australia Monetary Policy Board’s June meeting, relative to the level it was prior to this meeting.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Reserve Bank of Australia after its June 16, 2026 meeting, as listed on the official Reserve Bank of Australia calendar: https://www.rba.gov.au/schedules-events/board-meeting-schedules.html

This market may resolve as soon as the Reserve Bank of Australia's media release for their June 16, 2026 meeting with relevant data is issued. If no decision on the target for the cash rate is issued by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No Change" bracket.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders' razor-thin split on the Reserve Bank of Australia's June decision—51% no change versus 48% rate hike—stems from conflicting signals in Australia's resilient labor market and easing inflation pressures. The RBA held its cash rate at 4.35% in May amid hawkish board minutes highlighting persistent services inflation, while April employment surged by 39,000 jobs, keeping unemployment at a low 4.0%. Yet, trimmed-mean CPI cooled to 3.8% in Q1, aligning closer to the 2-3% target band and tempering hike bets. With no major data releases before the June 18 meeting, trader consensus hinges on RBA's tolerance for upside wage risks versus global dovish pivots like the Fed, rendering no-change the fragile favorite amid real-money positioning.

question: Spread: East Bengal FC (-1.5)
description:
In the upcoming Indian Super League game, scheduled for April 16 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "East Bengal FC" if East Bengal FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bengaluru FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on indiansuperleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: East Bengal FC vs. Bengaluru FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Indian Super League game, scheduled for April 16 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Bengaluru FC's red-hot form atop the ISL table, with four straight wins including a 3-1 home thrashing of East Bengal last month, anchors trader consensus heavily in their favor for this rematch at Sree Kanteerava Stadium. East Bengal, mired in mid-table mediocrity with just one win in six and defensive woes conceding 12 goals recently, faces an uphill battle away, where they've lost their last three. No major injuries reported on official lists, but Bengaluru's attacking depth led by Aleksandar Jovanovic exploits East Bengal's leaky backline. Momentum and home advantage tilt probabilities, though ISL upsets like East Bengal's past Kolkata derby heroics remind traders of volatility ahead of playoffs.

East Bengal, mired in mid-table mediocrity with just one win in six and defensive woes conceding 12 goals recently, faces an uphill battle away, where they've lost their last three. No major injuries reported on official lists, but Bengaluru's attacking depth led by Aleksandar Jovanovic exploits East Bengal's leaky backline. Momentum and home advantage tilt probabilities, though ISL upsets like East Bengal's past Kolkata derby heroics remind traders of volatility ahead of playoffs.

question: Game 3: Both Teams Beat Roshan?
description:
This market is about whether both teams kill Roshan at least once during Game 3. Roshan is a powerful neutral boss in Dota 2 that spawns at the start of the game and respawns 8–11 minutes after each death, dropping the Aegis of the Immortal and other valuable items.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Astini+5 and  Pipsqueak+4 each kill Roshan at least once during Game 3. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not kill Roshan during Game 3.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 3 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed and ends via forfeit, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had killed Roshan prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Dota 2: Astini+5 vs  Pipsqueak+4 (BO3) - PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Astini+5 and  Pipsqueak+4 in the PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B, initially scheduled for March 20 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Astini+5" if Astini+5 win the match against  Pipsqueak+4.

This market will resolve to " Pipsqueak+4" if  Pipsqueak+4 win the match against Astini+5.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Pipsqueak+4 enters as trader consensus favorite against Astini+5 in this PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B BO3 clash, reflecting their superior recent form with two straight qualifier wins, including a dominant 2-0 over a mid-table squad. Astini+5 struggles with inconsistent drafts and a 1-3 record lately, hampered by midlaner lineup flux amid stand-in reports. Head-to-head favors Pipsqueak 3-1 this season, bolstered by carry synergies thriving in the current 7.36 meta emphasizing split-push strategies. Key watch: Pipsqueak's rest edge versus Astini fatigue from back-to-back series; upsets possible if Astini exploits early aggression, but group advancement pressure tilts momentum toward the higher-seeded side.

question: Game 3: Any Player Ultra Kill?
description:
This market is about whether any player achieves an Ultra Kill during Game 3. In Dota 2, an Ultra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy heroes in rapid succession without dying.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves an Ultra Kill during Game 3. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves an Ultra Kill. A Rampage (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as an Ultra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 3 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed and ends via forfeit, this market will resolve based on whether an Ultra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Ultra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

question: Will the Bank of Russia decrease the key rate after the June Meeting?
description:
This market will resolve according to the change in the key rate resulting from the Bank of Russia’s June meeting, relative to the level it was prior to this meeting.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Bank of Russia after its June 19, 2026 meeting as listed on the official Bank of Russia calendar: https://www.cbr.ru/eng/dkp/cal_mp/#t13

This market may resolve as soon as the Bank of Russia’s press release for their June 19, 2026 meeting with relevant data is issued. If no decision on the key rate is issued by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket tilts decisively toward a Bank of Russia key rate cut at 64% implied probability for the June 7 decision, driven by expectations of moderating inflation pressures after April's 8.3% year-over-year CPI print showed a slower 0.6% monthly rise, signaling potential peak dynamics amid capacity constraints in Russia's war-heated economy. No-change odds at 28.5% reflect caution over persistent overheating—Q1 GDP surged 5.4% with unemployment at 2.6%—while hike bets linger at 12.5% due to ruble stability around 87/USD and fiscal deficit risks from military spending. Recent CBR rhetoric emphasizes data-dependence ahead of June CPI data, positioning a cut as the market-implied base case if disinflation accelerates.

question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the July 2026 meeting?
description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal funds range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Federal Reserve's July 2026 meeting.

If the target federal funds rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed options, the change will be rounded up to the nearest 25 and will resolve to the relevant bracket. (e.g. if there's a cut/increase of 12.5 bps it will be considered to be 25 bps)

The resolution source for this market is the FOMC’s statement after its meeting scheduled for July 28-29, 2026 according to the official calendar: https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm.

The level and change of the target federal funds rate is also published at the official website of the Federal Reserve at https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the FOMC’s statement for their July meeting with relevant data is issued. If no statement is released by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 21, 5PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Will Aksel V. Johannesen be the next Løgmaður of the Faroe Islands following the 2026 Faroese general election?
description:
General elections are scheduled to be held in the Faroe Islands on 26 March 2026.

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally appointed as Løgmaður (Prime Minister) of the Faroe Islands following the 2026 Faroese general election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally appointed as Løgmaður following the 2026 Faroese general election. Any interim or caretaker head of government will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of the Faroe Islands; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Next Prime Minister of Faroe Islands
events.description:
General elections are scheduled to be held in the Faroe Islands on 26 March 2026.

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally appointed as Løgmaður (Prime Minister) of the Faroe Islands following the 2026 Faroese general election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally appointed as Løgmaður following the 2026 Faroese general election. Any interim or caretaker head of government will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of the Faroe Islands; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors incumbent Løgmaður Beinir Johannesen at 65.5% implied probability to remain next Prime Minister of the Faroe Islands, reflecting his Sambandsflokkurin (Union Party)'s double-digit lead in final pre-election polls for the April 29 snap Løgting election. Aksel V. Johannesen's Javnaðarflokkurin (Social Democrats) trails at around 20% support, earning 18% odds as the primary challenger due to historical governing experience. Lower probabilities for Jenis av Rana (Progress), Ruth Vang (Centre), Bárður á Steig Nielsen (Self-Government), and Høgni Hoydal (Republicans) stem from single-digit polling amid focus on fisheries, economy, and Denmark ties. Recent debates and steady Union momentum have reinforced the frontrunner's edge, though voter turnout could sway the coalition-forming outcome.

question: Spread: Kansas Jayhawks (-13.5)
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for March 20 at 9:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Kansas Jayhawks" if the Kansas Jayhawks win the game by 14 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "California Baptist Lancers". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: California Baptist Lancers vs. Kansas Jayhawks
events.description:
This event is for the CBB game between California Baptist Lancers and Kansas Jayhawks on March 20 at 12:00 AM ET.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Kansas Jayhawks command a 91% implied probability against California Baptist Lancers, reflecting their elite roster depth and home-court dominance at Allen Fieldhouse. As a top-10 ranked powerhouse entering the 2024-25 season unbeaten in exhibitions, Kansas features All-American caliber talent like Hunter Dickinson and Dajuan Harris, poised to exploit CBU's mid-major profile from the WAC. Lancers sit at 0-0 after roster turnover via transfers but posted just a .438 win percentage last year against lesser competition. No key injuries mar official reports for either squad, though Kansas's superior athleticism and pace historically crushes similar mismatches, tempering upset potential amid early-season volatility.

question: Valorant: Fennel vs Murash (BO3) - VCL Japan: Phase 1
description:
This market refers to the Valorant Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between Fennel and Murash in the VCL Japan: Phase 1, initially scheduled for March 21 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Fennel" if Fennel win the match against Murash.

This market will resolve to "Murash" if Murash win the match against Fennel.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fennel leads trader consensus as favorites in the VCL Japan Phase 1 BO3 against Murash, driven by their dominant 3-1 group stage record featuring clean sweeps on Ascent and Lotus, contrasting Murash's 2-2 mark marred by upsets to weaker foes. No roster disruptions or bans announced, but Fennel's IGL Laz has excelled in post-plant scenarios, boosting win rates above 65%. Murash relies on duelist punch but falters in econ rounds, per recent VOD reviews. Head-to-head splits 1-1 historically; map pool edges toward Fennel's veto strength amid playoff positioning stakes. Rest advantage favors Fennel post-bye.

question: Will no one dissent the April Fed decision?
description:
The next Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting is scheduled for April 28-29, 2026. The policy decision will be announced at 2:00 PM Eastern Time on April 29, followed by the Fed Chair’s press conference at around 2:30 PM ET.

This market will resolve according to the number of dissenting votes recorded at the next Federal Reserve Open Market Committee monetary policy meeting, specifically those dissenting on the Fed Funds Rate decision.

The resolution source for this market is the FOMC’s statement after its meeting scheduled for April 28-29, 2026, according to the official calendar: https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the FOMC’s statement for their April meeting with relevant data is issued; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Polymarket favors one FOMC dissenter (47.5% implied probability) at the July 30-31 meeting, edging out two (38%), amid hawk-dove tensions over rate-cut timing following June minutes that exposed divisions—some officials eyeing no 2024 easing despite market-priced September odds near 90% via fed funds futures. Resilient jobs data and sticky core CPI have hawkish voices like Bostic and Kashkari pushing back against dovish calls from Goolsbee, contrasting unanimous votes in the prior four meetings. Competitive edge for one versus two hinges on dot-plot revisions potentially trimming March's three-cut median, with trader capital wagering statement nuances tip the scale without altering the no-change policy consensus.

question: Will Social Democratic Party win the most seats in the Løgting in the 2026 Faroese general election?
description:
General elections are scheduled to be held in the Faroe Islands on 26 March 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the Løgting (parliament of the Faroe Islands) as a result of the 2026 Faroese general election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed name appears first in alphabetical order.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Løgting in the 2026 Faroese general election, not any coalition it may be a part of.

This market will resolve based on the results of the 2026 Faroese general election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve solely on the official results reported by the Government of the Faroe Islands, such as those published by Statistics Faroe Islands (https://hagstova.fo/en/society/elections/elections-faroese-parliament).

eventMetadata.context_description: People's Party's commanding lead in recent polls, consistently above 30% support, positions it as the overwhelming trader favorite at 77.5% implied probability to win the most seats in the Faroe Islands' Løgting election on April 29. Incumbent Social Democratic Party trails at around 20%, reflected in its 13.5% odds amid voter fatigue with the current Centre-led coalition facing criticism over economic management and fisheries policy. Union Party holds steady third at 5.0% on pro-Denmark appeals, while Republic, Progress, and Centre linger below 2% due to fragmented support. No major shifts in the past week's polls or campaign events have altered this trajectory, underscoring traders' confidence in the wisdom of crowds.

General elections are scheduled to be held in the Faroe Islands on 26 March 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the Løgting (parliament of the Faroe Islands) as a result of the 2026 Faroese general election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed name appears first in alphabetical order.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Løgting in the 2026 Faroese general election, not any coalition it may be a part of.

This market will resolve based on the results of the 2026 Faroese general election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve solely on the official results reported by the Government of the Faroe Islands, such as those published by Statistics Faroe Islands (https://hagstova.fo/en/society/elections/elections-faroese-parliament).

eventMetadata.context_description: People's Party's commanding lead in recent polls, consistently above 30% support, positions it as the overwhelming trader favorite at 77.5% implied probability to win the most seats in the Faroe Islands' Løgting election on April 29. Incumbent Social Democratic Party trails at around 20%, reflected in its 13.5% odds amid voter fatigue with the current Centre-led coalition facing criticism over economic management and fisheries policy. Union Party holds steady third at 5.0% on pro-Denmark appeals, while Republic, Progress, and Centre linger below 2% due to fragmented support. No major shifts in the past week's polls or campaign events have altered this trajectory, underscoring traders' confidence in the wisdom of crowds.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 21, 6PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Counter-Strike: MOUZ vs 9z (BO3) - BLAST Open Rotterdam Group B
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Lower bracket quarterfinal 1 match between MOUZ and 9z in the BLAST Open Rotterdam Group B, initially scheduled for March 21 at 9:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against 9z.

This market will resolve to "9z" if 9z win the match against MOUZ.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

No roster changes reported for either, preserving MOUZ's siuhy-led firepower on EU-preferred maps like Inferno and Mirage. Group B winner advances; 9z's upset potential hinges on BUENO's AWPing, but MOUZ's depth implies 70-75% implied probability per market consensus.

eventMetadata.context_description: **Jiri Lehecka's superior ranking (#33) and recent hard-court prowess, including a quarterfinal run at Indian Wells with wins over Frances Tiafoe and top seed Jannik Sinner before a tight loss to Grigor Dimitrov, anchor the 84.5% implied probability favoring him against qualifier Moise Kouame (#282) in their Miami Open first-round matchup.** The 23-year-old Czech's powerful serve and baseline aggression contrast sharply with the 19-year-old Frenchman's inexperience in main-draw Masters events, where Kouame advanced as a lucky loser after qualifying triumphs over overmatched challengers like Alexandre Muller. No injuries mar official reports for either, but Lehecka's 70% win rate on fast hard courts versus sub-250 opponents historically justifies trader consensus on a lopsided edge, tempered by the upset potential of young qualifiers.

question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - March 21, 6PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vitality enters as clear favorites in their BO3 Group B clash against TheMongolz at BLAST Open Rotterdam, with trader consensus implying around 70% win probability driven by the French squad's superior firepower led by ZywOo, who boasts a 1.25 rating over the last three months. Recent roster stability favors Vitality—no changes post-Maj3r's benching—while TheMongolz benefit from rest after a lighter schedule. Watch map vetoes, as Mongolz struggle on Ancient (28% win rate). Momentum tilts Vitality amid Group B's high stakes for playoff seeding.

question: Will Romuald Wadagni be the next President of Benin?
description:
Presidential elections are scheduled to be held in Benin on 12 April 2026, with a potential runoff to be held within 15 days if no candidate secures an absolute majority.

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally declared elected as President of Benin following the 2026 presidential election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally elected as President of Benin following the 2026 presidential election. Any acting, interim, or caretaker President will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such President is elected by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the government of Benin and the relevant electoral authorities of Benin, including the Autonomous National Electoral Commission (https://www.cena.bj/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Traders weigh upcoming party primaries and candidate registrations, with markets reflecting skin-in-the-game assessments of Talon's influence on voter turnout and electoral outcomes.

events.title: Next President of Benin
events.description:
Presidential elections are scheduled to be held in Benin on 12 April 2026, with a potential runoff to be held within 15 days if no candidate secures an absolute majority.

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally declared elected as President of Benin following the 2026 presidential election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally elected as President of Benin following the 2026 presidential election. Any acting, interim, or caretaker President will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such President is elected by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the government of Benin and the relevant electoral authorities of Benin, including the Autonomous National Electoral Commission (https://www.cena.bj/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Patrice Talon's endorsement of Finance Minister Romuald Wadagni as his successor has driven trader consensus to 88.5% implied probability for Wadagni in Benin's 2026 presidential election, signaling strong institutional backing amid Talon's dominance over the political system. Wadagni, a close Talon ally overseeing economic reforms, emerged as the frontrunner after the October 2024 announcement, sidelining rivals including National Assembly President Paul Hounkpè at 9.5%. Opposition faces structural barriers from constitutional changes limiting challengers, reinforcing incumbency advantages seen in recent Benin polls. Traders weigh upcoming party primaries and candidate registrations, with markets reflecting skin-in-the-game assessments of Talon's influence on voter turnout and electoral outcomes.

question: Spread: Knicks (-18.5)
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Knicks" if the Knicks win the game by 19 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Nets". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Nets".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Knicks vs. Nets
events.description:

If the Knicks win, the market will resolve to "Knicks".
If the Nets win, the market will resolve to "Nets".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: New York Knicks hold an 88.5% implied probability as heavy favorites against the Brooklyn Nets, driven primarily by their superior recent form and healthier lineup. The Knicks boast a 5-2 record early in the season, fueled by Jalen Brunson's 28.6 points per game and Karl-Anthony Towns' return to full strength after a preseason ankle tweak, per official injury reports. In contrast, the Nets sit at 1-6, hampered by Nic Claxton's extended knee absence and Cam Thomas' questionable status with a back issue, weakening their defense and scoring. Knicks also own a 4-1 edge in recent head-to-heads, amplified by home-court advantage at Madison Square Garden, where they shoot 48% from the field. Trader consensus reflects these roster and momentum edges, though Nets' desperation could spark an upset.

eventMetadata.context_description: Houston Rockets' strong 8-3 start and four-game win streak anchor their 65.5% implied probability against the Atlanta Hawks, who sit at 4-7 with back-to-back losses. question: Will the highest temperature in Chongqing be 13°C on March 21?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chongqing Jiangbei International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 21 Mar '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chongqing Jiangbei International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chongqing/ZUCK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest numerical weather prediction models from sources like ECMWF and GFS point to a high near 20-21°C in Chongqing on March 21, driving the 48% implied probability for 21°C or higher and 28% for exactly 20°C as leading outcomes. This aligns with early spring climatology, where March highs average 18-20°C amid warming southerly flows and urban heat effects boosting diurnal peaks. Recent developments include a model update showing slight upward revisions from yesterday's cooler 18-19°C signals, influenced by persistent high-pressure ridging; actual temperatures will resolve via official China Meteorological Administration station data at the central observatory, with low odds below 18°C reflecting minimal cold front risks.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors a Beijing high of 17°C (42.5%) or 16°C (37.0%) on March 21, driven by the latest ensemble forecasts from the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) and Global Forecast System (GFS), which converge on mild conditions with highs in the mid-teens Celsius amid a weak high-pressure ridge over northern China. Historical March data (avg. 17.5°C high) and yesterday's 17°C observation underscore this narrow band, with low odds for extremes reflecting stable anticyclonic conditions.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors a Shenzhen high of 25°C (62%) on March 21, driven by the latest ensemble forecasts from global models like ECMWF and GFS, which converge on mild subtropical conditions with peaks around that mark amid steady sea breezes moderating urban heat island effects. Lower odds for 24°C (22%) and 26°C (21%) reflect minor model spread, but negligible chances below 23°C or above 28°C stem from absent signals for cold snaps or unusual heat advection in current teleconnection patterns. Upcoming CMA updates could refine these market-implied odds further.

Official China Meteorological Administration updates show minimal precipitation risk, heightening focus on insolation-driven peaks, though urban heat island effects in Wuhan add 1-2°C locally. Traders eye hourly station data for precise resolution amid model spread of ±2°C.

question: Will Rafael López Aliaga finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Peruvian presidential election?
description:
First-round presidential elections are scheduled to be held in Peru on April 12, 2026, with a potential second round on June 7, 2026, if no candidate receives more than 50% of the valid votes outright.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the results of this election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve solely on the official results as reported by the Peruvian government, specifically the National Office of Electoral Processes (Oficina Nacional de Procesos Electorales, ONPE) (https://www.onpe.gob.pe/elecciones/) and the National Jury of Elections (Jurado Nacional de Elecciones, JNE) (https://portal.jne.gob.pe/portal/)

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the results of this election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve solely on the official results as reported by the Peruvian government, specifically the National Office of Electoral Processes (Oficina Nacional de Procesos Electorales, ONPE) (https://www.onpe.gob.pe/elecciones/) and the National Jury of Elections (Jurado Nacional de Elecciones, JNE) (https://portal.jne.gob.pe/portal/)

question: Will the highest temperature in Shenzhen be 23°C on March 22?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Shenzhen Bao'an International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 22 Mar '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Shenzhen Bao'an International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/shenzhen/ZGSZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors a highest temperature in Shenzhen on March 22 of 27°C (31.5% implied probability) or 26°C (29.5%), reflecting the latest ensemble forecasts from models like ECMWF and GFS, which project peak highs of 26-28°C under mild southerly winds and above-normal sea surface temperatures in the South China Sea. Differentiating factors include subtle variations in afternoon cloud cover—potentially capping at 26°C if thicker stratus develops—or clearer skies boosting to 27-28°C via enhanced solar insolation and Shenzhen's urban heat island effect, which adds 1-2°C locally. March climatology averages 25°C highs, but current warm air advection from the tropics narrows uncertainty, with final odds hinging on tomorrow's high-resolution CMA updates.
